top_signals.title: Why Fed Cuts Beat Rate Hikes
top_signals.summary: Markets may be pricing yesterday's economy. iCapital's Dan Suzuki joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why slowing job growth and cooling inflation make Fed rate cuts more likely than hikes, why higher Treasury yields haven't broken the stock rally, and why AI leadership may be shifting away from chipmakers toward hyperscalers that can actually monetize their massive investments. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/07 -  Bank of England Levy: Notification Document Levy Year 2026/27

top_signals.title: UK Fintech Lendable Pledges Personal Loans to Raise £500 Million
top_signals.summary: UK digital lender Lendable Ltd. is raising £500 million ($671 million) by selling securities backed by a portfolio of personal loans, a deal that would support its ambitions to push further into lending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 10% discount Gone? Progressive Ends Motive Dashcam Enrollments, Signals New Telematics Program
top_signals.summary:
Progressive has ended new enrollments in its commercial trucking dashcam program with Motive, marking the end of a partnership that many fleets have used to improve safety and qualify for insurance discounts. The change became effective on July 1, 2026. While current customers will continue receiving benefits for now, trucking companies hoping to enroll in […]

The post 10% discount Gone? Progressive Ends Motive Dashcam Enrollments, Signals New Telematics Program appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: A New Texas Mayor Takes Over Amid 2,200% Tax-Base Boom
top_signals.summary: Mark Hill, the new mayor of Frisco, Texas, talks about the challenges and opportunities of managing a city whose population has soared soared 600% and whose tax base is up 2,200% in the past 25 years. He speaks with Bloomberg's Julie Fine. (Source: Bloomberg)
